name: Dispositivos compartidos por múltiples tarjetas
query:
MATCH (d:Device)<-[:FROM_DEVICE]-(p:Payment)-[:USES_CARD]->(c:Card)
WHERE p.graph_name = $graph_name
WITH d, count(DISTINCT c) AS total_cards
WHERE total_cards >= 3
ORDER BY total_cards DESC
LIMIT 10
MATCH (d)<-[:FROM_DEVICE]-(p2:Payment)-[:USES_CARD]->(c2:Card)
WHERE p2.graph_name = $graph_name
RETURN d, p2, c2;

name: Tarjetas utilizadas en múltiples países
query:
MATCH (c:Card)<-[:USES_CARD]-(p:Payment)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(co:Country)
WHERE p.graph_name = $graph_name
WITH c, count(DISTINCT co) AS total_countries
WHERE total_countries >= 2
ORDER BY total_countries DESC
LIMIT 10
MATCH (c)<-[:USES_CARD]-(p2:Payment)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(co2:Country)
WHERE p2.graph_name = $graph_name
RETURN c, p2, co2;

name: Comercios conectados a múltiples entidades sospechosas
query:
MATCH (m:Merchant)<-[:AT_MERCHANT]-(p:Payment)
WHERE p.graph_name = $graph_name
AND coalesce(p.risk_score, 0) >= 25
WITH m,
count(*) AS suspicious_payments,
count(DISTINCT p.card_id) AS cards,
count(DISTINCT p.device_id) AS devices,
count(DISTINCT p.customer_id) AS customers
WHERE suspicious_payments >= 3
AND (cards >= 2 OR devices >= 2 OR customers >= 2)
ORDER BY suspicious_payments DESC
LIMIT 10
MATCH (m)<-[:AT_MERCHANT]-(p2:Payment)-[:USES_CARD]->(c:Card)
MATCH (p2)-[:FROM_DEVICE]->(d:Device)
MATCH (cu:Customer)-[:MADE_PAYMENT]->(p2)
WHERE p2.graph_name = $graph_name
AND coalesce(p2.risk_score, 0) >= 25
RETURN m, p2, c, d, cu;

name: Posibles agrupaciones de comportamiento anómalo
query:
MATCH (d:Device)<-[:FROM_DEVICE]-(p:Payment)-[:USES_CARD]->(c:Card)
WHERE p.graph_name = $graph_name
WITH d, collect(DISTINCT c) AS cards, count(DISTINCT c) AS card_count
WHERE card_count >= 4
LIMIT 10
UNWIND cards AS c1
MATCH (c1)<-[:USES_CARD]-(p2:Payment)-[:IN_COUNTRY]->(co:Country)
MATCH (p2)-[:AT_MERCHANT]->(m:Merchant)
WHERE p2.graph_name = $graph_name
RETURN d, c1, p2, co, m;
